tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    delete 2
    delete 3
end
config firewall addrgrp
    delete "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
end
config firewall address
    delete "DNS-Resolver-1"
end
config firewall address
    edit "DNS-Resolver-Internal"
        set subnet 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set member "DNS-Resolver-Internal"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-DNS-Resolvers"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-DNS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
config firewall policy
    move 3 before 100
    move 2 before 3
end
show firewall address
show firewall addrgrp
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall addrgrp

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) #     delete "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     delete "DNS-Resolver-1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "DNS-Resolver-Internal"
new entry 'DNS-Resolver-Internal' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Resolver-Int~nal) #         set subnet 192.168.1.1 255.2 55.255.255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Resolver-Int~nal) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall addrgrp

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) #     edit "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
new entry 'Approved-DNS-Resolvers' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (Approved-DNS-Res~ers) #         set member "DNS-Resolver-Int ernal"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (Approved-DNS-Res~ers) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-DNS-Resolvers"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 3 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 2 before 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid 4b93780e-2aaa-51f1-661c-400dbb1190b1
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid 4b937f98-2aaa-51f1-ba50-9e269099a44c
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid 4b9386a0-2aaa-51f1-3479-d72cd658c9ea
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid 4b938b82-2aaa-51f1-9651-5c969472a928
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid 4b93906e-2aaa-51f1-6ce0-e362e47da6e0
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid 4b939532-2aaa-51f1-d740-402806da042b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid 4b939a00-2aaa-51f1-57bc-c5df07b8957b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid 4cc9d646-2aaa-51f1-f874-eaa5ad2f756b
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid 4cc9d8ee-2aaa-51f1-48b3-d0af865bf9e3
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid 4cc9dd62-2aaa-51f1-2394-79a4d795a23f
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid 4cca9c16-2aaa-51f1-9e6e-812d9da92f73
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid 86c374ba-2aaa-51f1-9136-a3a9e06535af
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid 86c6a2ca-2aaa-51f1-ea6e-ee47e9103dd9
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"
        set uuid 929f02e0-2aaa-51f1-9434-6b57c1417ba1
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
    edit "DNS-Resolver-2"
        set uuid 78806282-3351-51f1-a460-806b0e90b40c
        set subnet 192.168.1.2 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "DNS-Resolver-Internal"
        set uuid 8e65ea22-3351-51f1-e860-e14dd0942d0c
        set subnet 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall addrgrp
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "G Suite"
        set uuid 4b93a1d0-2aaa-51f1-dfc1-8e9f1fd19c3b
        set member "gmail.com" "wildcard.google.com"
    next
    edit "Microsoft Office 365"
        set uuid 4b93a89c-2aaa-51f1-9c2a-179b22c0fe53
        set member "login.microsoftonline.com" "login.microsoft.com" "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set uuid 8e6bf1d8-3351-51f1-53d4-82e847e08f0a
        set member "DNS-Resolver-Internal"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-DNS-Resolvers"
        set uuid 8e71a1f0-3351-51f1-5bf7-198a88f4a2ed
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-DNS"
        set uuid 8e8638a4-3351-51f1-b6e8-8ccf6abef982
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
